column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Sarasota County. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest information.
So far it is a 20 hour storm for us in Nokomis... and more to come.
This storm had a ton of water.
It's bad here in North Lakeland. Heavy rain.

Do you know when it might let up in Sarasota!
Thank you for everything you do you’re the best. ♥️🙏🏼
Lost power in Homosassa few minutes ago.
Yay power just came back on!!
